strategy.description: Reduce position sizes. Prefer mean-reversion and range-bound strategies. Be very selective — quality over quantity.

picks.name: Humana Inc.
picks.buy_reason: Valuation: Trading at trailing P/E of 17.3x, forward P/E of 11.1x (indicating earnings acceleration), P/B of 1.16x, well below sector averages. This suggests the market is underpricing the company's earnings power and asset base. Fundamentals: Revenue growing at 11% year-over-year. The combination of growth and profitability indicates a business with sustainable competitive advantages and strong pricing power. Technical picture: Rsi bullish divergence detected, suggesting downside momentum is fading while the price prepares for a reversal. Risk/reward: Entry zone $163.67–$173.47 with a target of $195.68 (+15.0% upside) against a stop loss at $158.25 (-7.0% risk), yielding a 2.1:1 reward-to-risk ratio. Recommended holding period: 4-8 months.

picks.name: Incyte Corporation
picks.buy_reason: Valuation: Trading at trailing P/E of 14.5x, forward P/E of 10.7x (indicating earnings acceleration), well below sector averages. This suggests the market is underpricing the company's earnings power and asset base. Fundamentals: Revenue growing at 28% year-over-year, profit margins of 25% demonstrating operational efficiency. The combination of growth and profitability indicates a business with sustainable competitive advantages and strong pricing power. Technical picture: Price remains above the 200-day moving average, confirming the long-term structural uptrend is intact, and pulled back below the 50-day SMA while the 200-day uptrend remains intact — a potential mean-reversion entry opportunity, RSI at 24 indicates oversold conditions — contrarian buying opportunity. Risk/reward: Entry zone $92.03–$94.12 with a target of $106.65 (+15.0% upside) against a stop loss at $89.27 (-3.7% risk), yielding a 4.0:1 reward-to-risk ratio. Recommended holding period: 4-8 months.
